description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can of beer with a capacity of 350 ml. The can features a gradient label design that transitions from white at the top, through orange, to a golden yellow at the bottom, evoking the appearance of a freshly poured beer with foam. The front of the can displays a circular emblem with a stylized portrait and wheat motifs, surrounded by bold, modern typography. The back of the can contains a block of fine print, likely regulatory and health information, printed vertically in white. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab for opening. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a glossy finish that reflects light.
description: A tall, glossy aluminum beer can with a gradient yellow-orange label, bold graphics, and a metallic pull tab top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with a circular emblem, portrait, wheat graphics, and bold text.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the gradient color transition and the realistic beer foam graphic at the top.
description_view_2: The back view displays a vertical block of fine print, likely legal or health information, on the yellow-orange background.
description_view_3: This side view shows the can's volume marking (350 ML) and the continuation of the gradient label design.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a gradient from white to orange to yellow, with a circular emblem containing a stylized portrait and wheat graphics. Bold, modern typography is used for the main text, and the overall design is clean and visually striking.
